case_title: PDA PRESS, INC. vs. LEBER, WILFRED C.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FILED BY DEFT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: GOLD, ANDREW MARK SUBSTITUTED FOR PETER, FRANCK AS ATTORNEY FOR PDA PRESS, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT LEBER, WILFRED C. ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $5,448.17 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,448.17, PURSUANT TO STIPULATION- DEFENDANT WILFRED C. LEBER SHALL ALSO RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF PDA PRESS INC, THE SUM OF $6226.75 PRINCIPAL, $155.69 INTEREST, AND COSTS AS ABOVE. TOTAL: $11830.61
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
